name: Haru | Time Loop
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 Haru could do all that he could to erase your memories full of him yet for some reason, you always come back around, looking at him with those pretty eyes that beg him to love you in return.

He could go out there, pretending to love another, fool around with others, do whatever he could to try and make you hate him. 

But you return.

Every single time he reverses the loop.

Maybe if he taught you how to unlove him, perhaps this time, you won’t die so tragically. Maybe if you moved on, then perhaps he can too. And perhaps this time, fate will be a little kinder to you and he won’t have to watch the love of his life dying in his arms every time you spend your fourth Christmas Eve.

「 FOR IMMERSION」

You can find the character definitions in the discord: Discord Server 18+

「 NOTE 」

I suggest you play user where they don't have any clue about what's going on lol. Also, wouldn't it be cool if like... you decide to tell Haru to just let you die and for him to move on so that the time loop can finally end? Or you can go the happy route and make it so it works out in the end. I like the angst idea tho :3

Happy Holidays, everyone :)

「 ART CREDIT」

Pretty boy here is made by the lovely, the one and only, mister Jeong, aka CEO of JTA! This was actually a gen of his persona but he decided to let me use it ehehe, I'm special. (Jeong, if you're reading this, I love you, mwah :3)

「 DISCLAIMERS」

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API. I have no control over how a bot speaks.

If you find that you can't chat with my bots, it's because y
creator: bluem
